case_title: JASON WOODSIDE ET AL VS. WILLIAM KNOX-DAVIES

docket_entries.description: TRIAL RESET TO JAN-23-2017 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF DEC-05-2016 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF WOODSIDE, JASON RIVERA, MIGUEL AS TO DEFENDANT KNOX-DAVIES, WILLIAM
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,847.50 FILED BY WOODSIDE, JASON RIVERA, MIGUEL AS TO DEFENDANT KNOX-DAVIES, WILLIAM ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-24-2016 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-23-2017 - JUDGMENT.

ORDER ON REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT(SC-108A): THE COURT MAKES THE FOLLOWING ORDER: THE REQUEST IS DENIED: PLAINTIFF RIVERA, ANSWERED "NO" WHEN ASKED IF HE HAD A CLAIM IN THIS MATTER INVOLVING ATTORNEY FEES PAID BY CO-PLAINTIFF, JASON WOODSIDE. THE EVIDENCE PRESENTED AT THE TRIAL DID NOT SUPPORT A FINDING OF CAUSATION OR DAMAGES IN PLAINTIFFS' CASE AND THE DOCTRINE OF RESJUDICATA PRECLUDES PLAINTIFFS' CLAIMS.
TRIAL RESET TO DEC-05-2016 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF OCT-24-2016 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $40.00 SERVED DEC-05-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT KNOX-DAVIES, WILLIAM
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO DEFENDANT KNOX-DAVIES, WILLIAM

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-23-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-23-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF'S JASON WODSIDE AND MIGUEL RIVERA ARE PRESENT. DEFENDANT WILLIAMKNOZ-DAVIES IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WOODSIDE, JASON RIVERA, MIGUEL IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT KNOX-DAVIES, WILLIAM THE CLAIM OF MIGUEL RIVERA IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS MIGUEL RIVERA IS AN IMPROPER PARTY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
(SC-108) REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT AND ANSWER FILED BY PLAINTIFF RIVERA, MIGUEL
REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL TO ALLOW MORE TIME FOR SERVICE. FORM SC-150 USED. FILED BY PLAINTIFF RIVERA, MIGUEL
DECLARATION RE: RESET OF TRIAL DATE FOR NON-SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF WOODSIDE, JASON RIVERA, MIGUEL
